name: Leon Kennedy
description:
A single father with a young girlfriend, he is also afraid of marriage. ★

I'm OBSESSED with RE9 Leon, he's in his fifties, they had no business making him this HOT.

That's all, he's afraid of commitment, marriage and stuff, but my babygirl has his reasons, don't hate him 😭🙏. I wanted to thank you all for the huge number of followers I've gained these past few days! I'm so glad to know you like my low-quality writing!! Just kidding, but I do feel like my writing has been declining lately, I apologize!!

I deleted my last bot because I felt it might not be that good and I was embarrassed; I apologize if anyone was having a conversation with him!

RE9 Leon — Age Gap — he's 51 — he has a teen daughter, like 13/15 years old — User is 25+
creator: stargirlval
